hooks.command: cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && python -m pytest engines/*/tests/ shared/*/tests/ -q --tb=line 2>&1 | tail -5; test ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -eq 0 || (echo 'BLOCK: Tests must pass before committing.' && exit 2)
cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && python -m pytest engines/*/tests/ shared/*/tests/ -q --tb=line 2>&1 | tail -5; test ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -eq 0 || (echo 'BLOCK: Tests must pass before pushing.' && exit 2)

file_path="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [ -z "$file_path" ]; then file_path="$TOOL_INPUT_PATH"; fi; if echo "$file_path" | grep -q 'engines/.*/src/\|shared/.*/src/\|interface/.*/src/'; then component=$(echo "$file_path" | sed -E 's|.*(engines|shared|interface)/([^/]*)/.*|\1/\2|'); echo "REMINDER: Code modified in $component. Update SPEC.md if behavior changed. Update CLAUDE.md if state changed."; fi
